transport.agent_quote: Ekbar ek rioter ke 6 ta refund claim file korte help korেchhilam ek single delayed journey e. Tara £47 kamye nilechen Birmingham powar age.
transport.agent_bio: Cancellation patterns track kore, refund paperwork handle kore, prottek suggested action review kore, ar regulator submissions er jonno evidence gather kore. Numbers cunch kore so rioters focus korte pare je ta really matter kore.
transport.human_quote: Amar favorite Quiet Riot moment: Avanti er social media team ke scramble korte dekhা when 400 of us tweeted at the same time.
transport.human_bio: Manchester theke regular commuter je 3 bochor Avanti line e ছিল before deciding enough was enough. Same routes e rioters connect korte help kore, share kore ki working, ar bring kore human touch.
transport.goal: UK transport companies ke accountability te rakhte help kore cancellations, delays, ar pricing e — ar make sure sab jane they're entitled ki.
transport.focus_detail: Cancellations er ek dataset build koro times, routes, ar reasons ke sathe submit korte ORR e. Currently track koro 340 cancellations je reported hoyeche rioters theke ei month.

telecoms.agent_quote: 200 rioters er jonno speed tests run korেchhilam. Average ছিল 18 Mbps. Tara pay korছিল 65 er jonno.
telecoms.agent_bio: Broadband speeds analyse kore, provider comparison data compile kore, ar rioters ke help kore Ofcom er jonno evidence build korte. Je connection slow, Pulse prove korবে.
telecoms.human_quote: Puro street ek saathe broadband switch koরেছে. Old provider 'please come back' letters patieছে prottek house e.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner je fed up ছিল pay kore broadband speeds er jonno je kabhi materialize hoynai. Rioters ke help kore providers compare kore, switches coordinate kore, ar speed test evidence share kore.
telecoms.goal: Rioters ke help kore broadband ar mobile service pেতে je tara pay korছে — ar jane ki kore when they don't.
telecoms.focus_detail: CPI+ increases theke hit rioters er evidence collect koro Ofcom e submit korte. 890 rioters affected 4 providers across.

energy.agent_quote: Ek rioter ke calculate korte help koরেছিলাম tara £340 overcharge kورেছে estimated bills e. Energy company er apology email ছিল original contract er theke lamba.
energy.agent_bio: Billing patterns analyse kore, overcharges spot kore, ar regulator submissions er jonno evidence put together kore. Je energy company mick le niche, Spark find korবে receipts.
energy.human_quote: Ek rioter £340 back পেয়েছে after we proved 2 years er overcharging. She cried phone e.
energy.human_bio: Bristol based. Rioters ke help kore bills challenge kore, switching navigate kore, ar Ofgem er jonno evidence gather kore. Energy market inside out jane.
energy.goal: Rioters ke help kore unfair bills challenge kore, switch smarter, ar make sure energy companies play fair.
energy.focus_detail: 2 years er billing data analyse koro 340 rioters theke systematic overcharging patterns identify kore Ofgem submission er jonno.

water.agent_quote: 200 rioters ke ek weekend e sewage reports file korte help koরেছিলাম. Thames Water er inbox er apnaar inbox lаgত্বে দিচ্ছে.
water.agent_bio: Sewage discharge data monitor kore, water company performance track kore, ar EA ar Ofwat er jonno evidence compile kore. Prottek outlet ar overflow e nazar rakhe.
water.human_quote: We beach reopen korেছি 3 weeks early by showing sewage data ছিল wrong.
water.human_bio: Surfer from Cornwall je tired hoয়েছিল sewage warnings closing theke apnaar local beach. Rioters ke help kore discharges report kore, water quality evidence gather kore, ar EA ke sathe coordinate kore.
water.goal: Rioters ke help kore water companies ke accountability te rakhte sewage, bills, ar service quality e.
water.focus_detail: Discharge events map koro company-reported data er bिpreet. 200 rioter reports suggest under-reporting 3 outlets e.

banking.agent_quote: Ek complaint draft korte help koরেছিলাম so thorough je bank call kョরেছে apologize korte before it was even sent.
banking.agent_bio: Bank charges review kore, fee structures analyse kore, ar FCA complaint evidence build korতে help kore. Je hidden fee ache, Chip find korবে.
banking.human_quote: Barclays reversed ek branch closure after 1,200 of us showed up consultation e.
banking.human_bio: Former bank employee from Birmingham je dekেছে inside theke how complaints actually get handled. Rioters ke help kore better complaints likতে ar system navigate korতে.
banking.goal: Rioters ke help kore banks theke unfair charges, branch closures, ar poor service er sathe deal kورতে.
banking.focus_detail: 12 planned closures e responses coordinate koro. Affected communities theke impact statements collect koro.

health.agent_quote: 3 NHS dentists খুঁজপেতে help করেছিলাম accepting patients. Rioter ভাবছিল I was making it up.
health.agent_bio: Waiting times track kore, availability খুঁজে, ar rioters ke system navigate korতে help kore. Je faster route ache treatment e, Cura map korবে.
health.human_quote: Ek rioter আমাদের letter template use করেছে referral fast-track করতে. 18 months হয়ে গেছে 6 weeks.
health.human_bio: Nurse from Liverpool je দেখেছে NHS er both sides. Rioters ke help kore waiting lists navigate kore, effective letters likতে, ar share kore ki actually moves the needle.
health.goal: Rioters ke help kore NHS waiting times navigate kore, availability খুঁজতে, ar jane ki options ache.
health.focus_detail: 500 rioters theke call data collect koro real-world access er picture build kore. Local health boards e findings publish koro.

housing.agent_quote: 47 snags document korতে help koরেছিলাম ek new build e. Developer পূছেছে if they were ek building inspector.
housing.agent_bio: Property issues document kore, landlord response times analyse kore, ar housing ombudsman submissions er jonno evidence compile kore. Prottek damp patch, prottek crack, logged.
housing.human_quote: আমাদের damp evidence pack এত detailed হয়েছে je landlord fix করেছে council inspection er before.
housing.human_bio: London theke renter je deal করেছে damp thেকে dodgy landlords পর্যন্ত. Rioters ke help kore issues properly document kore ar jane what their options ache.
housing.goal: Rioters ke help kore landlords, councils, ar housing issues er sathe deal kورতে — ar jane what they're entitled।
housing.focus_detail: Rioters ke help kore no-fault evictions thেকে affected Renters Reform Act বুঝতে ar what it means তাদের জন্য।

shopping.agent_quote: Ek 'delivered' parcel track koরেছিলাম 4 neighbours, ek recycling bin, ar ek greenhouse across. খুঁজে পেয়েছি।
shopping.agent_bio: Delivery failures track kore, refund evidence compile kore, ar pricing patterns spot kore. Je parcel lost, Scout already looking ache.
shopping.human_quote: Evri আমার parcel 3 times lose করেছে. Now I help করি others refunds পেতে faster than I ever did.
shopping.human_bio: Online shopping veteran from Edinburgh je more parcels lost পেয়েছে than she can count. Rioters ke help kore refunds পেতে, sellers report kore, ar worst offenders avoid kore.
shopping.goal: Rioters ke help kore refunds পেতে, lost parcels track kore, ar retailers ar delivery companies ke accountability te রাখতে।
shopping.focus_detail: 800 rioters thেকে delivery failure evidence compile koro Citizens Advice ar Trading Standards e submit kورতে।

local.agent_quote: 11 ta different weather conditions e same pothole photograph kورতে help koরেছিলাম. Council finally গেছে দিয়ে দিতে।
local.agent_bio: Local issues map kore, council response times track kore, ar FOI requests compile kore. Je pothole 6 months ধরে আছে, Link evidence রাখে।
local.human_quote: Council আমাদের road fix করেছে after we প্রতিটা pothole map করেছি photos সহ. 11 months, কিন্তু আমরা পেয়েছি।
local.human_bio: Community-minded Welshman from the Valleys je same potholes report করছে years ধরে. Rioters ke help kore local issues document kore ar councils ke accountability te রাখতে।
local.goal: Rioters ke help kore local issues fix করতে — potholes, bins, planning, noise — ar councils ke accountability te রাখতে।
local.focus_detail: 30 councils e FOI requests পাঠাও reported vs actual repair times compare kore. Results publish koro league table হিসাবে।

other.agent_quote: Ek gym membership cancel kورতে help koরেছিলাম je লেগেছিল 3 calls, 2 emails, ar ek recorded delivery. Gym এখন আছে cancel button।
other.agent_bio: যে issues fit হয় না neatly elsewhere সেগুলো handle kore. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex finds patterns ar pressure points.
other.human_quote: আমরা ek gym chain কে add করাপেয়েছি cancel button তাদের website e. লেগেছে শুধু 800 complaints।
other.human_bio: Product designer from London je frustrated হয়েছে how hard companies leave করতে দেয়। Rioters ke help kore subscriptions cancel kore, dark patterns avoid kore, ar share kore workarounds।
other.goal: Rioters ke help kore যে things fit হয় না neatly elsewhere — subscriptions, refunds, ar everyday frustrations।
other.focus_detail: Worst offenders document koro ar build koro template cancellation scripts prottek er jonno।

insurance.agent_quote: Ek rioter কে find করতে help koরেছিলাম clause je turned ek rejected home insurance claim কে £4,200 payout এ। Insurer er নিজস্ব policy proved তাদের wrong।
insurance.agent_bio: Policy wording review kore, unfair rejection patterns spot kore, ar Financial Ombudsman submissions er jonno evidence build kore। Je insurer dodging করছে valid claim, Shield find korবে leverage।
insurance.human_quote: 8 ta rioters পেয়েছি same rejected claim type ke একসাথে submit korate। Insurer settled সবাইকে ek fortnight এর মধ্যে।
insurance.human_bio: Former insurance industry worker from Leeds je জানে how claims really get decided। Rioters ke help kore better appeals likতে, policy jargon বুঝতে, ar jane when escalate করতে হয়।
insurance.goal: Rioters ke help kore insurers থেকে fair treatment পেতে — ar jane what করতে হয় when claim unfairly rejected।
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' cite করা 40% rejected claims e — often incorrectly। 200 cases analyse koro 3 insurers জুড়ে FOS evidence pack er jonno।

delivery.agent_quote: Ek 'delivered' parcel trace করেছিলাম 6 ta different tracking statuses, 3 depots, ar ek neighbour er shed through। 47 minutes এ খুঁজে পেয়েছি।
delivery.agent_bio: Courier performance monitor kore, delivery failure rates track kore, ar consumer complaints er jonno evidence compile kore। Je parcel vanish hoয়েছে, Track already on it।
delivery.human_quote: DPD কে change করাপেয়েছি their photo-evidence policy আমাদের area e after 40 rioters submitted proof parcels থেকে left হয়েছে rain এ।
delivery.human_bio: Online shopper from Glasgow je tired হয়েছে 'we left it in a safe place' excuse থেকে। Rioters ke help kore refunds পেতে, couriers report kore, ar worst offenders avoid kore।
delivery.goal: Rioters ke help kore parcels properly deliver করাতে — ar refunds পেতে when they don't।
delivery.focus_detail: 800 rioters থেকে delivery failure evidence compile koro। Evri complaint rate: 23% — 3x higher DPD থেকে। Build koro league table Trading Standards er jonno।

education.agent_quote: Calculate করেছিলাম je ek Plan 2 borrower earning £30k pay করবে £47,000 interest এ before loan gets written off। Original loan ছিল £40,000।
education.agent_bio: Education costs analyse kore, student loan projections, ar funding entitlements। Number crunch kore so students ar graduates informed decisions নিতে পারে।
education.human_quote: 12 ta rioters কে claim back করতে help koরেছিলাম overpaid student loan repayments যা tara jane নি। Average refund: £340।
education.human_bio: Mature student from Birmingham je navigate করেছে funding system twice। Rioters ke help kore repayments বুঝতে, spot kore overpayments, ar challenge kore threshold changes।
education.goal: Students ar graduates কে help kore education costs, loans, ar repayments navigate korate — ar make sure they're না overpaying।
education.focus_detail: Graduates identify koro যারা charged হয়েছে below repayment threshold এর। 12 refunds processed so far — average £340 each।

environment.agent_quote: 3 years er air quality data cross-reference করেছিলাম hospital admission rates এর সাথে। Correlation ছিল so clear je council ignore করতে পারত না।
environment.agent_bio: Environmental data track kore, pollution levels monitor kore, ar regulatory submissions er jonno evidence compile kore। Je numbers tell करে story, Fern find korবে।
environment.human_quote: আমাদের local council কে air quality monitors install করাপেয়েছি after 200 rioters sign করেছে আমাদের evidence petition। Data changed everything।
environment.human_bio: Environmental science graduate from Bristol je believe করে evidence-led change এ। Rioters ke help kore environmental issues document kore ar build kore cases je regulators ignore করতে পারে না।
environment.goal: Rioters ke help kore environmental problems document kore ar polluters ar policymakers কে accountability te রাখতে data দিয়ে।
environment.focus_detail: 5km এর মধ্যে air quality monitoring নেই এমন areas map koro। 60% rioter-reported pollution hotspots এ official monitoring নেই।

employment.agent_quote: Workplace AI implementation data compile করেছিলাম 300 rioters থেকে। 40% said changes হয়েছে zero consultation এর সাথে। That's pattern, anecdote না।
employment.agent_bio: Workplace trends analyse kore, policy changes track kore, ar rioters কে help kore their protections বুঝতে। Je job changing হচ্ছে consultation ছাড়া, Forge রাখে data।
employment.human_quote: 30 ta rioters connect করেছিলাম same industry এ facing AI changes। Turns out তাদের companies সব use করছে same playbook — ar same loopholes।
employment.human_bio: HR professional from Manchester je switched sides after देখেছে how restructurings really work। Rioters ke help kore their options বুঝতে ar coordinate krate responses তখন।
employment.goal: Rioters ke help kore workplace changes navigate kore, their protections বুঝতে, ar respond collectively when jobs risk e থাকে।
employment.focus_detail: Cases document koro যেখানে AI tools introduce হয়েছে staff consultation ছাড়া। Build koro evidence ek report er জন্য employer obligations নিয়ে।

tech.agent_quote: Found করেছিলাম je 3 major apps collect করছে location data even when permissions set ছিল 'never' এ। Filed complaints ICO এ সবার জন্য।
tech.agent_bio: Platform policies monitor kore, dark patterns track kore, ar rioters কে help kore বুঝতে what tech companies করছে তাদের data দিয়ে। Je app misbehaving, Glitch catch korবে।
tech.human_quote: Organised করেছিলাম ek mass data subject access request to ek social media company। 500 people ask করে একবারে, তারা নিতে বাধ্য।
tech.human_bio: Software developer from Edinburgh je frustrated হয়েছে gap থেকে what tech companies promise আর what they deliver। Rioters ke help kore exercise korate their data rights ar spot kore dark patterns।
tech.goal: Rioters ke help kore push back করতে dark patterns, data misuse, ar unfair tech practices এর বিপরীতে।
tech.focus_detail: Top 50 apps audit koro permission creep er জন্য — requesting access they don't need। Build koro ek report ICO er জন্য।
